view.title: Bona Haolo {id}
view.emailSentMessage: Imeile ea kamohelo e rometse hape. Sheba lehokong la hau.
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Na u u-bua nnete ha u batla ho romela hape imeile ea amohela?

order.title: Oda Haolo
order.iAgreeToTerms: Ke bale maemo a ka holimo 'me ke a lumela.
order.hostnameHelp: Sebelisa lebitso la moamoheli ho tseba seva. Domain ha e hlokahaleng ho ba e nepahetseng kapa e ngolisitsoe. Ntlha e le 'ngoe e hlokeha lebitso la moamoheli. Mehlala e meng: database.local, web.server kapa lebitso la hao.
order.passwordRequirement: Tlhokomeliso: Password e tlameha ho ba le bonyane litlhaku tse 8, setlhaku se le seng se potlakileng, setlhaku se le seng se phahameng, nomoro e le 'ngoe le senatagare.
order.contactSales: Kopa u ikopanye le lefapha la rona la thekiso.
order.autoRenewNotice: Khopolo e tla iphetola hape khoeli le khoeli ka {cost} ho fihlela e a hlakolloa.
order.tosAcknowledgement: Ka ho shaya lebokose lena, u lumela hore u reka sehlahisoa sa khopolo se iphetolang ka bo-eona (Ho ea ka Mantsoe a Bolelitseng Holimo) mme se lefuoe ho khathe ea hao ea kiriti. Haeba u batla ho hlakola khopolo ea hao, u ka kenella portaleng ea bareki, khetha tshebeletso e teng mme u tobetse sekhokaho sa Hlakola kapa u romele imeile ho: billing{'@'}interserver.net.

reverseDns.title: Lipeakanyo tsa DNS ea Morao
reverseDns.changeWarning: Liphetoho ho DNS ea morao li nka ho fihlela hora e le 'ngoe ho hlaha.

ipmiLive.title: IPMI IP
ipmiLive.description: Fa IP e phelang ho IPMI controller e thibetsoe ho IP ea hao le ho laoloa ho hora tse 24.
ipmiLive.emailIpmiCredentials: Romela Litlhahisoleseding tsa IPMI ka Imeile
